title: MCoBeauty - Baby Face Multiuse Cream Stick for Lips and Cheeks - Blush Stick in Pink Rose Shade - Contains Moisturising Jojoba Seed Oil, Coconut Oil and More - Peony Rose
features: VERSATILE CREAM STICK: We created the Baby Face Multi-use cream stick to bring you the ultimate dewy glow with zero fuss. This creamy lip and cheek cream blush adds an instant flush of colour, making skin and lips look naturally fresh, healthy and radiant. It’s the easiest way to glow up and go.

DAB, BLEND, SWIPE. YOU CHOOSE THE LOOK: Whether you want a sheer tint or something with more impact, this buttery formula has you covered. Lightly dab and diffuse for a soft-focus flush, or swipe directly on cheeks and lips for a more vibrant, glowy and buildable wash of colour. Your look, your rules.
FORMULATED WITH JOJOBA & COCONUT OILS: Contains skin-loving Jojoba Seed Oil and Coconut Oil. These moisturising ingredients can help condition your skin, leaving it feeling soft.

YOUR EVERYDAY BEAUTY SHORTCUT: This multiuse stick is a must-have for busy mornings, travel makeup bags, and quick top-ups between plans. No brushes, no mess, just creamy colour that fits seamlessly into your daily routine. For anyone who loves minimal effort with maximum payoff.

WHO WE ARE: MCoBeauty is a leading luxe-for-less beauty brand, created to break the rules of traditional high-end cosmetics. We're proudly female-founded, driven by purpose, and passionate about redefining what beauty looks and feels like, because great products should be for everyone, not just a few.
